title: The Jersey Stack — Ep 1: The Transistor (DRAFT v6)
description:
🎬 DRAFT v6 — for review only, not for public sharing.

New Jersey invented the transistor. A 20-mile stretch of NJ holds the birthplace of the thing that runs every device in your pocket, and a monument to itself just outside the Severance set. Episode 1 of The Jersey Stack follows the story from Bell Labs Murray Hill in 1947 through the Traitorous Eight walkout in 1957 — and ends back at Fort Monmouth, where Netflix is rebuilding the ground that built the hardware.

What changed v5 → v6:
• Pacing fix — every multi-image scene now stretches each panel to fill its full narration duration. v5's xfade math was eating 0.5s per transition (scene 7 was 2s short, scenes 1/5/6/8/13/20 were 0.5-1s each), so audio drifted out of sync against the video timeline. All 28 scenes now land within ~30ms of their narration budget.
• Total runtime now 14:59 (was 14:44 in v5)

What changed v4 → v5 (still in this cut):
• Cold open re-cut — Scene 1 + 2 merged into a single ~22s opener (no more 2.4s drone over silence)
• Eugenics line removed from Scene 19
• Closing bookend re-recorded — 'developer named Somerset' replaced with 'Bell Works metroburb' framing
• Scene 28 'The Quiet Line' title card removed entirely
• Scene 21 (Fort Monmouth) now has Signal Corps Center + AN/PRC-25 hero stills
• Scene 27 (Count-Up) has 1947 point-contact transistor + modern Apple-silicon die macro

Known issues still in this cut:
• Scene 29 closing cutaway montage still deferred — drone hold remains after the 20s of clips
• Scene 27 motion-graphic counter (1 → 92,000,000,000) still not rendered — static images stand in
• Some AI-generated text (S20 newspaper, S26 logo cascade) may have rendering artifacts

Chapters:
0:00 Drone Reveal & Severance Hook
0:38 Bell Labs Murray Hill
2:32 The Vacuum Tube Problem
3:42 The Trio (Bardeen, Brattain, Shockley)
5:32 December 23, 1947 — The Demo
7:08 Shockley Finds Out — the Junction Transistor
8:46 The June 1948 Press Conference & Fort Monmouth
10:45 1956 — Nobel & the Consent Decree
11:45 Shockley Goes West & the Traitorous Eight
13:04 The Count-Up — 1 to 92 Billion
13:39 Back to the Drone — Bell Works & Netflix Fort Monmouth
14:42 Next Episode — The Switch

---
Part of The Jersey Stack — a five-episode series on how New Jersey invented the modern computer.
